name: Case Similar to Johnny
history: Ongoing interpersonal difficulties involving a partner named Ivan and his family. Recent trust and betrayal issues involving Ivan. Ongoing contact with Ivan's family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I express my emotions, I will lose control and be seen as weak.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must avoid confrontation to maintain peace.
coping_strategies: Avoids confrontation and suppresses emotions to prevent conflict.
situation: Discovered that Ivan made travel plans without consulting the patient.
auto_thought: If I confront Ivan, it will lead to a fight and he might leave me.
behavior: Avoids discussing the issue with Ivan and suppresses feelings.
